---
title: "Contact"
body-classes: page-title
page-layout: full
---

::: {.page-header}

::: {.header-text}
::: {.header-title}
CONTACT
:::

::: {.header-subtitle}
Get in touch with the CALM Lab.
:::
:::

:::

::: {.contact-intro}
For questions about the lab’s research, collaborations, or opportunities to work together, please use the contact information below.
:::

:::: {.contact-layout}

::: {.contact-card .contact-card-primary}

<div class="contact-icon contact-icon-blue">
<i class="bi bi-envelope"></i>
</div>

## General Contact

**Jason S. Tsukahara, Ph.D.**
Principal Investigator, CALM Lab

[Email](mailto:jason@example.edu)

[Website](https://www.jasontsukahara.com)

[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=393wE14AAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao)

:::

::: {.contact-card}

<div class="contact-icon contact-icon-green">
<i class="bi bi-people"></i>
</div>

## Opportunities

Prospective students, collaborators, and others interested in the lab’s work are welcome to reach out by email. When relevant, please include a brief note about your interests and reason for contacting the lab.

:::

::::
